title: Createmon With Spice
description: A modpack combining the world's of Create with Cobblemon with some extra mods for spice.
body:
Createmon With Spice is a modpack featuring primarily Create and Cobblemon at it's core.

It includes many addons for both core mods to allow for greater compatibility between the two mods as well as the rest in the modpack.

This pack is intended to be played on peaceful mode as many of the cobblemon drops have been changed to award hostile mob drops as well as some recipe tweaks to make some otherwise unobtainable items obtainable again.
